ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the station */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the station (e.g., weather station, survey station) */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Spatial geometry of the station */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_station_type FOREIGN KEY ("station_type") REFERENCES station_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the station type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the station type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the station type was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the station type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location update */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being updated */,
  "easting" REAL /* Easting coordinate of the station at the time of update */,
  "northing" REAL /* Northing coordinate of the station at the time of update */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the station at the time of update */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Spatial geometry of the station at the time of update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the station location was updated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the location update was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_history_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data administrator, analyst, mapping professional) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "inactive" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active or inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the station data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station being accessed */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Spatial geometry of the access event */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the station data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access event was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user-role relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_tags" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "tag_name")
)
